prompt:
Declaration (in markdown format):

# Project: webby
A websocket multiplayer game.

## Players
- Capacity: 2-8
- States: lobby, in_game, spectator
- Auth: ephemeral_token

## Rounds
- Duration: 60s
- Win condition: first_to_10

## Protocol
- Transport: websocket
- Serialization: msgpack
- Heartbeat: 5s

## Persistence
- Leaderboards: redis
- Match history: postgres

## Deploy
- Environments: staging, prod
- Region: auto

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
• Project name: webby
• Game type: websocket multiplayer
• Minimum player count: 2
• Maximum player count: 8
• Player state: lobby
• Player state: in_game
• Player state: spectator
• Authentication method: ephemeral_token
• Round duration: 60 seconds
• Win condition: first player to reach 10 points
• Transport protocol: WebSocket
• Serialization format: msgpack
• Heartbeat interval: 5 seconds
• Leaderboard storage: Redis
• Match history storage: PostgreSQL
• Deployment environment: staging
• Deployment environment: prod
• Deployment region selection: auto
